name: Talisman: Digital 5th Edition
short_description: The definitive, most customisable version of Talisman, ever. Discover a world where every journey is a fresh experience in the ultimate digital sandbox for this iconic fantasy adventure board game. This is your Talisman, your rules.
detailed_description:
Embark on a new Epic Adventure in the World of Talisman

Talisman, the classic fantasy board game returns as the definitive, most customizable version of Talisman ever, in Talisman: Digital 5th Edition.

More than just a visual update, Talisman: Digital 5th Edition delivers a wealth of enhancements that elevate your adventure into the definitive, digital Talisman adaptation.

Use the new, streamlined 5th Edition ruleset from the physical board game, or tailor your preferences with house rules and more for the Classic Talisman experience you've come to love. With the powerful Deck Editor, you can craft the exact adventure you want to play. This is your Talisman, your rules.

What is Talisman?

Talisman is a fantasy-themed adventure board game, first released in 1983, where you can take on the role of various adventurers, from warriors and wizards, to thieves and ghouls, each with their own strengths and unique abilities. You’ll race against each other to reach the centre of the board first, with the danger ramping up as you get closer and closer.

You’ll fight strong enemies, gain valuable treasure, cast awesome spells, and encounter mysterious strangers on your journey. You’ll need a good mixture of luck and strategy, and to balance risk and reward if you want to emerge the victor!

What's New in Talisman: Digital 5th Edition?

In Talisman: Digital 5th Edition, the eleventh era has just dawned - the three Great Gods who originally created the Crown of Command have faded into myth. A new champion must rise to claim the Crown and rule the world in the era to come. Will you be that champion?

  • Revamped Rules: Experience Talisman with updated rules that streamline gameplay, enhancing strategic depth, and ensuring a more balanced and engaging experience for players both old and new.

  • Modern Design: Enjoy a sleek and intuitive interface designed for seamless navigation and effortless immersion, whether you're playing solo or competing with friends online.

  • Remastered Classic Expansions: With The Reaper and The Frostmarch already available, we’re fully remaking your 4th Edition expansions as new, 5th Edition versions, free for anyone who owns the original expansions in Talisman: Digital Classic Edition!

Craft Your Own Adventure!

The biggest new feature in Talisman: Digital 5th Edition is the Deck Editor, which allows you to fully customise your Talisman experience by adding, removing and adjusting the cards you'll encounter during your game. Save your created decks, play them with your friends online and unleash your creativity with billions of possible combinations, and more being added with each expansion.

Key Features:

  • Solo or Multiplayer: Play alone against AI opponents or gather your friends for epic multiplayer battles, online or locally.

  • Expansive Content: Choose from a vast array of characters, each with their own unique abilities, and explore a richly detailed world filled with countless adventures and challenges.

  • Customizable Experience: Tailor your gameplay experience with the new Deck Editor, various house rules and more ways to customise your Talisman adventure.

INCLUDES TALISMAN: DIGITAL CLASSIC EDITION

Talisman: Digital 5th Edition also includes a free copy of the Talisman: Digital Classic Edition base game, which is based on the 4th Revised Edition ruleset. This will be added to your Steam library upon purchase.

Join the Adventure Today

Whether you're a seasoned Talisman veteran or a newcomer to the world of fantasy board games, Talisman: Digital 5th Edition will offer an unforgettable journey filled with magic, mystery, and endless possibilities. Are you ready to claim the Crown of Command once and for all? Or will you be turned into a toad again?

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Russian
